periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 4am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 76. Northeast wind around 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 5pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 81. Northeast wind 3 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 2am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 74. East wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

periods.name: Monday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers before 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2pm and 3pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 3pm and 4pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 80. East wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
